name: Navitaire Airline Reservation System REST API
what_it_does: Navitaire airline reservation system REST API for low-cost carriers (LCCs), ultra-low-cost carriers (ULCCs), and hybrid airlines to manage passenger services, reservations, inventory, check-in, loyalty, and ancillary sales — enabling automated airline operations including booking, seat management, check-in, boarding, and revenue optimization through Navitaire's New Skies passenger service system serving 50+ airlines worldwide. Enables AI agents to manage booking for airline reservation creation and modification automation, handle inventory for flight capacity and availability management automation, access check-in for passenger check-in and seat assignment automation, retrieve ancillary for baggage, seat, and upgrade upsell automation, manage boarding for gate and boarding pass management automation, handle loyalty for frequent flyer miles and status automation, access revenue for fare class and pricing management automation, retrieve passenger for PNR lookup and passenger record management automation, manage disruption for irregular operations rebooking automation, and integrate Navitaire with GDS, NDC, OTAs, and airline operations systems for passenger service system automation.
use_cases: Managing airline reservations and PNRs for low-cost carrier distribution and operations automation agents
Automating check-in and seat assignment for airline passenger service automation agents
Processing ancillary sales (bags, seats, extras) for LCC revenue optimization automation agents
Handling flight disruption rebooking for airline irregular operations management automation agents
not_for: Full-service carrier complex itineraries (Navitaire is optimized for LCC simple itineraries, not complex interlining)
GDS booking without airline API (Navitaire is the airline's own PSS, not a GDS distribution platform)
Airport operations management (Navitaire is passenger services, not airport ops like AODB or DCS only)
best_when: A low-cost or hybrid airline wanting AI agents to automate passenger booking, check-in, ancillary sales, loyalty management, and disruption handling through Navitaire's New Skies PSS serving 50+ airlines.
avoid_when: AIRLINE CUSTOMER ONLY: Navitaire API is exclusively for airlines using Navitaire's New Skies PSS; automated open API access assumption creates restricted access; automated must be a Navitaire airline customer. NEW SKIES IS LCC-OPTIMIZED: Navitaire New Skies is designed for low-cost carrier business model; automated complex interlining assumption creates limited interline functionality; automated must understand LCC product model constraints. AMADEUS OWNERSHIP AFFECTS STRATEGY: Navitaire is owned by Amadeus; automated independent Navitaire roadmap assumption creates Amadeus integration dependencies; automated should understand Navitaire's Amadeus strategy for long-term architecture decisions. DISTRIBUTION REQUIRES SEPARATE NDC/GDS INTEGRATION: Navitaire handles PSS functions but GDS/NDC distribution uses separate integration; automated one-API-for-distribution assumption creates separate GDS integration requirement; automated must implement separate distribution channel integration.

auth.notes: Navitaire uses OAuth2 for New Skies PSS REST API. REST API with JSON. Minneapolis, MN HQ. Founded 1990. Acquired by Amadeus 2016. Products: New Skies (reservations, check-in, inventory), New Loyalty, SkySales (shopping engine), Revenue Management. SDKs: None public. 50+ airline customers. Serves LCCs globally (Air Arabia, Blue Air, Cebu Pacific, etc.). Competes with Sabre and Radixx for LCC PSS market.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Test environment for airline implementation projects; production requires airline contract
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual SaaS subscription per passenger; module-based licensing; implementation services
pricing.notes: Minneapolis MN. Amadeus subsidiary. Per-passenger SaaS. 50+ airline customers. LCC PSS leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; booking and check-in APIs throttled per airline tier

known_agent_gotchas: SESSION MANAGEMENT IS CRITICAL: Navitaire API requires session management for multi-step booking workflows; automated stateless booking assumption creates missing session context for fare hold, seat selection, and payment steps; automated must maintain session through complete booking workflow

FARE LOCK HAS TIME LIMIT: Navitaire fare hold (booking without payment) expires within minutes; automated unlimited-hold assumption creates fare_expired for delayed payment; automated must complete payment within Navitaire hold window

ANCILLARY MUST BE SOLD BEFORE PAYMENT: Ancillary products (bags, seats) must be added before finalizing payment; automated post-payment ancillary assumption creates ancillary_add_after_payment error; automated must implement ancillary upsell before payment step

IROP HANDLING IS TIME-SENSITIVE: Irregular operations (flight cancellations, delays) trigger rebooking options with expiry; automated patient-rebooking assumption creates offer_expired for delayed IROP response; automated must implement real-time IROP event handling

LOYALTY REDEMPTION REQUIRES VALIDATION: FFP mile redemption requires account validation and mile balance check before booking; automated assumed-redemption assumption creates insufficient_miles error; automated must validate loyalty account and balance before offering redemption
agent_readiness.security_notes: Airline PSS. PCI-DSS, IATA DPC, GDPR. OAuth2. Global. Passenger PNR and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Airline PSS. PCI-DSS, GDPR. OAuth2. Global. Passenger and payment data.
